steps.title: Identify the crucial contrast
steps.content: The passage opens with “But Viscardo's role in history would have remained insignificant were it not for Venezuelan revolutionary Francisco de Miranda.” This contrast—between what would have happened without Miranda and what actually happened—is the key signal establishing that the main idea must focus on Miranda's essential role.

steps.title: Match what Miranda actually did
steps.content:
Choice C correctly identifies that Miranda influenced both the letter's content through his edits and footnotes and its distribution through circulation.

The other choices either claim things the passage doesn't discuss (A's disputed authorship and D's independence persuasion) or misrepresent Miranda's role (B overstates it as writing the majority).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
